notes: UpgradeScreen + _UpgradeSuccess only (subscription_screens.dart ~1087-1366). Real seam is billing.buyPlan (IAP purchase -> OS payment sheet -> receipt/purchaseToken sent to backend for SERVER-SIDE verification via BillingService._verifyWithBackend -> backend sets the business plan, server-authoritative) then repo.saveBusiness mirrors the canonical plan id locally so every screen reflects it. The screen hardcodes the target plan to 'business' (_plan => kPlans.firstWhere(id=='business'), line ~1097). Plan data (name/price/features/productId) is read from kPlans in lib/data/billing/billing.dart. Per conventions the server is the SOLE entitlement authority and plan changes are user-confirmed (the Subscribe/Continue button is the confirmation). INLINE COPY (not data, note only): hardcoded Business feature bullets at lines ~1180-1185 and ~1324-1328, and renewal-date strings 'renews 6 Aug' at ~1310-1311; 'per month · starts today' ~1167; store-lifecycle disclaimer copy ~1207-1215. Do NOT invent an endpoint path; IAP receipt-verification endpoint shape is a backend-design decision.

reads.source: kPlans (lib/data/billing/billing.dart) — static catalog, not a repo/db read; screen selects id=='business'

fields.name: productId
fields.type: string(store product id; null for starter/enterprise)

actions.name: buyPlan
actions.description: IAP purchase of an auto-renewable subscription plan. Client opens OS payment sheet (billing.buyPlan), purchase stream yields the store receipt/purchase token, which is posted to the backend for server-side verification with Apple/Google; backend validates the receipt and sets the business plan (server is sole authority). On success repo.saveBusiness(BusinessProfilesCompanion(plan: Value(_plan.id))) mirrors the canonical plan id locally.

payload.name: productId
payload.type: string(store product id from Plan.productId, e.g. 'oweme_business_monthly')

uiStatesHandled: purchase-success (_success flag flips to _UpgradeSuccess confirmation screen after saveBusiness)
purchase-error/canceled (entitlement reverts to none; button re-enabled)
store-unavailable fallback (simulator/desktop/off-store: local demo unlock of active state)
